faq.question: How long does it take to set up?
faq.answer: Most users are up and running in under 15 minutes. Enterprise setups with custom workflows take less than 24 hours.

faq.question: Do I need technical skills?
faq.answer: Not at all. Sound Effects Pilot is designed for non-technical users. Our templates handle the complexity.

faq.question: What if I need to cancel?
faq.answer: Cancel anytime with one click. No contracts, no penalties.

faq.question: Can I try before I buy?
faq.answer: Yes! Start with a free trial — no credit card required.

problemAgitate.problem: Manual sound effects creation is costing you time and money
problemAgitate.agitate: Every hour you spend manually handling sound effects creation is an hour you could be earning. Your competitors have already automated this and are pulling ahead.

dreamOutcome: Imagine automating your entire sound effects creation workflow — delivering better results in half the time while your competitors struggle to keep up.
riskReversal: Try Sound Effects Pilot risk-free for 30 days. If you're not delivering better sound effects creation faster, get a full refund.
scarcity: Limited-time: First 500 customers get 50% off annual plan
